title: The Law Reports Act, 1875
description: An Act for the improvement of Law Reports. Preamble [Repealed by the Government of India (Adaptation of Indian Laws) Order, 1937.]

provisions.title: 1. Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Act may be called the Law Reports Act, 1875 .

provisions.title: 2. Local extent
provisions.content: It extends to the whole of [Bangladesh].

provisions.title: 3. Commencement
provisions.content: [And it shall come into force at once].

provisions.title: 4. [Repealed ]
provisions.content: 2. [Repealed by the Repealing Act, 1876 (Act No. XII of 1876).]

provisions.title: 5. Authority given only to authorized reports
provisions.content: 3. No Court shall be bound to hear cited, or shall receive or treat as an authority binding on it, the report of any case decided [* * *] by [the Supreme Court], other than a report published under the authority of [Government].

provisions.title: 6. Authority of judicial decisions
provisions.content: 4. Nothing herein contained shall be construed to give to any judicial decision any further or other authority than it would have had if this Act had not been passed.
